mapper.select: SELECT c.class_name, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as total_reports, COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) as evaluated_reports, COALESCE(AVG(e.total_score), 0) as avg_score, COALESCE(MAX(e.total_score), 0) as max_score, COALESCE(MIN(e.total_score), 0) as min_score FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.class_id = c.id AND u.role = 3 LEFT JOIN training_report r ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN evaluation_record e ON e.report_id = r.id WHERE c.id = #{classId} GROUP BY c.id, c.class_name

SELECT CASE WHEN e.total_score < 60 THEN '0-60' WHEN e.total_score < 70 THEN '60-70' WHEN e.total_score < 80 THEN '70-80' WHEN e.total_score < 90 THEN '80-90' ELSE '90-100' END as score_range, COUNT(*) as count FROM evaluation_record e LEFT JOIN training_report r ON e.report_id = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.student_id = u.id WHERE u.class_id = #{classId} GROUP BY score_range ORDER BY score_range

SELECT r.title as report_title, e.completeness_score, e.specification_score, e.knowledge_score, e.total_score, e.evaluate_time FROM evaluation_record e LEFT JOIN training_report r ON e.report_id = r.id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY e.evaluate_time DESC
